action: Remove hardcoded Datadog API key from deploy.yml:23. Pin 3 unpinned actions to commit hashes. Add artifact signing stage to release pipeline.
rationale: Hardcoded Datadog API key in deploy.yml is exposed to anyone with repository read access. 3 third-party actions using mutable tags — supply chain compromise vector. No artifact signing means build artifacts cannot be verified.

artifact_integrity_gaps: images pushed by tag not digest

key_findings: 3 third-party actions not pinned to commit hash
No artifact signing stage in release pipeline
deploy.yml uses permissions: write-all — overly broad
